description_long: This object is a compact urban pumping station with a low, rectangular profile and a broad, flat roof structure. The main body is predominantly black, with a central raised section that appears to house the operational components, including a visible metallic or concrete box and a brown vertical pipe or vent. The structure is flanked by two wide, flat extensions on either side, likely serving as protective covers or platforms. The central area features a small, boxy unit and a vertical cylindrical element, possibly for access or ventilation. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative features and a focus on functional, durable materials. The station is suitable for installation in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or roadside utility zones.
description: A low, rectangular urban pumping station with a broad black roof, central operational unit, and side extensions. Features a metallic box and a vertical pipe or vent.
description_view_0: Front view shows the central operational unit, metallic box, and vertical pipe, flanked by wide black side extensions.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlights the depth of the side extension and partially obscures the central unit.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals mostly the flat black roof and minimal detail of the central unit.
description_view_3: Right-side view mirrors the left, showing the side extension and a partial view of the central operational area.
